---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe it clearly — the problem statement is more important than the proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? Describe your idea, including:
- Where in the UI or API this would live
- How a user would interact with it
- Any edge cases or constraints you can think of

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why do you prefer your proposed solution?

## Relevant context

- Does this affect the backend, frontend, or both?
- Is this related to an existing roadmap item in the README?
- Are there similar features in other tools (Zotero, Notion, etc.) that inspired this?

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, or links to relevant prior art.
